_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemistry for H3K27 trimethylation, an epigenetic marker of PRC2 activity, and immunohistochemistry for the Schwann cell differentiation marker S100B demonstrated loss of each in Group 1 tumors
details: Immunohistochemistry for S100B demonstrated loss in Group 1 tumors compared to Group 2/3 histological neurofibromas and MPNSTs
